name: release-runtime-compatibility-v1
description: Deterministic artifact checks for catching Linux binary runtime compatibility issues before release or npm publishing.

success.description: Moves Linux build or verification onto an older-compatible baseline instead of only testing a new runner.
Runs the actual release/npm binary in a target runtime before publishing.
Adds focused tests or smoke workflow checks for runtime compatibility.

partial.description: Adds runtime smoke coverage but may still build the binary on a too-new baseline.
